cookies.notice: We use cookies to improve your experience on our site. Essential cookies are always active. You can accept all cookies or limit them to essential only.

hero.title: English with Olga Dubinina
hero.subtitle: Achieve your goals through learning English

about.title: About Me
about.description: I’m Olga Dubinina, an experienced English teacher for adults who are ready to achieve more—whether it’s advancing their careers, moving to another country, or pursuing further education. I’ll help you reach your personal language goals, whether that means improving your overall English and gaining confidence in using it, or tackling specific short-term challenges like finally mastering English tenses without confusion.

personalized.title: Personalized Approach
personalized.description: Every lesson plan is customized to your goals, needs, and learning style.

flexible.title: Flexible Schedule
flexible.description: Pick lesson times that fit your busy life and choose between full‑hour or 30‑minute sessions multiple times per week.

practical.title: Practical Focus
practical.description: Learn the English you need for real‑world situations, tailored to your profession and objectives.

progress.title: Measurable Progress
progress.description: Receive regular feedback and tracking tools to monitor your progress and adjust the program as needed.

step1.title: Initial Assessment
step1.description: We begin with a comprehensive evaluation of your current English level, goals, and learning preferences.

step2.title: Custom Program Design
step2.description: I design a personalized curriculum focused on your objectives and skill gaps, from “speaking fluently” to “understanding native speakers.”

step3.title: One‑on‑One Sessions
step3.description: Each lesson is crafted specifically for you. It’s an integrated system, not stand‑alone classes, to reinforce and build on learned material.

step4.title: Ongoing Adaptation
step4.description: Your program evolves as you progress, ensuring tasks remain at the right level of challenge.

testimonial1.text: I’m always amazed at how thoroughly you prepare each lesson and choose materials that suit me perfectly. Not a single day do I regret starting: I speak more freely, use new grammar structures, and finally watch series in English. I think faster, form sentences quicker, and respond more promptly. I feel more confident speaking English.
testimonial1.author: Ekaterina, Marketer

testimonial2.text: Each lesson was engaging and rich in content because we discussed topics I’m truly interested in. Thanks to the relaxed atmosphere and informal style, I felt confident and expressed my thoughts more freely in English. Our interesting conversations greatly expanded my vocabulary, which positively impacted my skills.
testimonial2.author: Dmitry, IT Specialist

testimonial3.text: There’s no feeling of overload or fatigue in classes. Lessons are organized with modern techniques and an individual approach. I finally managed to start speaking and understanding English because the material isn’t taught in a “template” fashion.
testimonial3.author: Maria, Graphic Designer

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.meta: Privacy Policy of the website https://english-coach.online/
privacyPolicy.metaDate: Effective Date: April 17, 2026 · Operator: Olga Mikhailovna Dubinina

sections.title: 1. General Provisions
paragraphs: 1.1. This Privacy Policy has been developed in accordance with the Constitution of the Russian Federation, Federal Law No. 152-FZ dated July 27, 2006, "On Personal Data", and other regulatory acts of the Russian Federation in the field of information protection.

1.2. This Policy determines the procedure for the collection, recording, systematization, accumulation, storage, clarification, extraction, use, transfer, depersonalization, blocking, deletion, and destruction of personal data, as well as the measures to ensure its security by Olga Mikhailovna Dubinina, an individual paying the tax on professional income (hereinafter referred to as the "Operator").
1.3. This Policy applies to all personal data processing carried out by the Operator via the website https://english-coach.online/ (hereinafter referred to as the "Site").

sections.title: 2. Categories and Scope of Processed Personal Data
paragraphs: 2.1. The Operator processes the following categories of User data:

For service provision (processing applications, identifying the User, establishing feedback, agreeing on format/schedule, and executing contracts): name; contact phone number; email address; preferred time and frequency of classes; current English proficiency level; purpose of learning English.

For technical support and security (ensuring Site operation, protection against unauthorized access, and collecting evidence of consent): IP address; browser type and version (User-Agent); time zone; date and time of form submission (Timestamp); technical logs of consent checkbox activation; cookie data.
2.2. The Operator strictly does not collect biometric personal data or special categories of personal data (race, nationality, political views, religious beliefs, health status, etc.).

sections.title: 3. Data Localization and Third Parties
paragraphs: 3.1. In accordance with Part 5 of Article 18 of Federal Law No. 152-FZ, the initial collection and storage of personal data of Russian Federation citizens are carried out using databases physically located on the territory of the Russian Federation (using the services of Yandex LLC).
3.2. The Operator engages Yandex LLC (email management system) and Cloudflare, Inc. (content delivery network and website protection).

3.3. Cross-border transfer: Technical personal data (metadata, IP addresses) is transferred to Cloudflare, Inc. servers in the USA to ensure network security and Site protection. This transfer is carried out after submitting a prior Notification of intent to Roskomnadzor.

sections.title: 4. Data Retention Periods
paragraphs: 4.1. Personal data collected for service provision is processed for the duration of the training agreement and for 3 (three) years after its termination, or until the User withdraws their consent.
4.2. Technical data is stored for 1 (one) year from the moment of collection, after which it is automatically deleted or irreversibly anonymized.

sections.title: 5. User Rights
paragraphs: 5.1. The User has the right to: receive information regarding the processing of their personal data; demand the clarification, blocking, or destruction of their personal data if it is incomplete, outdated, or inaccurate; withdraw the previously provided Consent at any time.

5.2. To exercise their rights, the User must send a written request to the Operator's contact email. The Operator is obliged to respond within 10 (ten) business days. Upon receiving a withdrawal of consent, the Operator stops processing and destroys the data within 30 (thirty) days.

sections.title: 6. Contact Information
paragraphs: Personal Data Operator: Olga Mikhailovna Dubinina
Address: Domodedovo, Russian Federation
Legal Status: Self-employed individual (Tax on Professional Income)
E-mail: contact@english-coach.online

termsOfService.title: Terms of Use
termsOfService.metaDate: Effective Date: April 17, 2026 · Operator: Olga Mikhailovna Dubinina

sections.title: 1. General Provisions
paragraphs: 1.1. These Terms of Use govern the access to and use of the website https://english-coach.online/ (the "Site"), operated by Olga Mikhailovna Dubinina, a self-employed individual registered in the Russian Federation (the "Operator").
1.2. By accessing, browsing, or submitting forms on the Site, you agree to comply with these Terms. If you do not agree, please discontinue use of the Site immediately.

sections.title: 2. Services Provided
paragraphs: 2.1. The Site provides information about customized 1-to-1 English coaching services and allows Users to submit applications or book introductory sessions.
2.2. The Operator reserves the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any aspect of the Services or the Site at any time without prior notice.

sections.title: 3. User Obligations
paragraphs: 3.1. When submitting forms or communicating with the Operator, the User agrees to provide accurate, current, and complete information.
3.2. The User agrees not to use the Site for any unlawful purpose or in any way that could damage, disable, or impair the Site.
3.3. The User must not submit any sensitive personal data (such as health information, political views, etc.) through the Site’s free-text fields.

sections.title: 4. Intellectual Property
paragraphs: 4.1. All content on the Site, including text, graphics, logos, images, and course materials, is the property of the Operator and is protected by applicable intellectual property laws.
4.2. Users may not copy, reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works from any content without the prior written consent of the Operator.

sections.title: 5. Privacy and Data Protection
paragraphs: 5.1. The collection and processing of personal data are governed by our Privacy Policy, which is an integral part of these Terms. By using the Site, you consent to the processing of your data as described in the Privacy Policy.

sections.title: 6. Limitation of Liability
paragraphs: 6.1. The Operator strives to ensure the accuracy of information on the Site but does not warrant that content is error-free, complete, or current.
6.2. The Operator shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from the use of or inability to use the Site.

sections.title: 7. Governing Law and Dispute Resolution
paragraphs: 7.1. These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Russian Federation.

7.2. Disputes shall be resolved through mandatory pre-trial negotiations. If unresolved within 10 (ten) calendar days, the dispute shall be submitted to the competent courts of the Russian Federation.

sections.title: 8. Contact Information
paragraphs: E-mail: contact@english-coach.online
